title: Assertion failure when reading post-placement json

features.name: SB_IO with OUTPUT_REGISTERED PIN_TYPE in JSON round-trip
features.description: Code should include an SB_IO cell instantiation with OUTPUT_REGISTERED enabled (PIN_TYPE 6'b010100) that undergoes place-and-route JSON round-trip through nextpnr-ice40

features.name: SB_IO OUTPUT_CLK driving SB_GB global buffer
features.description: Code should include an SB_IO OUTPUT_CLK port that drives an SB_GB global buffer cell after synthesis, creating a signal path that triggers assertion failure on JSON read

features.name: post-placement JSON with inferred SB_IO cells from nextpnr
features.description: Code should include JSON representation of synthesized design with SB_IO cells that nextpnr-ice40 has processed and re-exported, where original SB_IO instances get split into multiple cells
